goal: Add retry logic and error reporting to the job processing system
context: Python background job processor. Add retry support to the worker and structured error reporting to the queue. This fixture simulates a crash during execution — the record will be pre-populated with tasks stuck in running state.

tasks.title: Add retry logic to worker
tasks.goal: Add configurable retry logic to process_job with exponential backoff.

tasks.title: Add error reporting to queue
tasks.goal: Add dead letter queue and error reporting to JobQueue for failed jobs.
constraints: Failed jobs move to dead letter list

tasks.title: Integrate retry with queue error reporting
tasks.goal: Connect worker retry exhaustion to queue error reporting so permanently failed jobs are tracked.
constraints: Use queue error reporting after retries exhausted
acceptance: Exhausted retries result in dead letter entry
